draft:
Subject: Follow Up on Application Status

Dear Hiring Team,

I hope this message finds you well. I am writing to follow up on my application for the position of Application Developer - AI Trainer at DataAnnotation in Bengaluru, submitted on May 23, 2026. 

I am excited about the opportunity to contribute to your team and would love to hear more about the status of my application when convenient. 

Thank you for your time.

Best regards,  
Abhishek Godara
summary: The email is a forwarded message from Indeed regarding an application for the position of Application Developer - AI Trainer at DataAnnotation located in Bengaluru.
